characters.name: Priscilla
characters.description: A Roman Christian widow who leads the catacomb community. Practical, courageous, exhausted.
characters.personality: Protective, shrewd, deeply faithful but worn thin by years of hiding.
characters.arc: Learns to trust Usagi and accept help after years of carrying everything alone.

characters.name: Marcellus
characters.description: A former Roman soldier converted to Christianity. Burns with righteous fury. Wants to fight back.
characters.personality: Passionate, impatient, genuinely loves the community but his anger blinds him.
characters.arc: Must learn that there is strength in witness, not only in warfare.

characters.name: Demas
characters.description: A charismatic Gnostic teacher. Quotes scripture fluently. His doctrine is poison wrapped in silk.
characters.personality: Eloquent, seductive, genuinely believes his own lies. Not malicious — deceived.
characters.arc: Either repents when confronted with truth, or falls deeper into self-deception.

characters.name: Peter
characters.description: Simon Peter. The Rock. Old, scarred, weary — but unbreakable. He has denied Christ once and will never do so again.
characters.personality: Gruff tenderness. Speaks in simple words that cut to the heart.

characters.name: Paul
characters.description: The Apostle to the Gentiles. Sharp mind, sharper tongue. Under house arrest but still writing letters.
characters.personality: Intellectual fire. Impatient with foolishness. Deeply compassionate beneath the edge.

characters.name: Senator Petronius
characters.description: A cultured Roman senator who offers to help the Christians — for a price. He is the Accuser.
characters.personality: Reasonable. Sympathetic. Always has a compromise that costs only a little faith.
accuser_dialogue: I only want what is best for your people. Why make this harder than it must be?
One pinch of incense on the altar. That is all Nero asks. Is your God truly so fragile?
Your Peter — he denied Christ three times. And he was forgiven. Surely one small compromise...
The arena will not be kind. I can stop this. All you must do is speak the words.

characters.name: Felix
characters.description: A street orphan who knows every tunnel in the catacombs. Quick, clever, terrified of soldiers.

characters.name: Julia
characters.description: A young Christian woman preparing for martyrdom with serene courage. She sings hymns in the dark.
